name: rebus-platform
description: Plattform for lærerstyrte rebuser med adminside, elevside og backend.

scripts.check: node --check src/server/index.js && node --check public/admin/app.js && node --check public/student/app.js && node --check scripts/build-student-app.mjs && node --check scripts/copy-android-web.mjs
scripts.android:sync: npm run mobile:build-web && npm run android:copy-web
scripts.android:open: npm run android:sync && npx cap open android
